target_area.description: First Ethical Considerations risk paragraph on page 10 and adjacent References spread

change_summary: Reframed the paragraph as direct ethics guidance: synthetic 3D assets are not human-subject data, but risks remain indirect and practical.
Replaced submission-oriented wording with author-facing reuse guidance for provenance, license compatibility, filtering criteria, and intended render use.
Tightened the downstream-model warning around material-change failures, object affordances, safety cues, texture, grounding cues, and real-world transfer.

observations: Before: page 10 rendered 'docu-' followed by 'ment asset provenance' in the first ethics paragraph.
Before: page 10 rendered 'ob-' followed by 'ject affordances'.
Before: page 10 rendered 'se-' followed by 'mantic grounding' and 'general-' followed by 'ization'.
Intermediate shorter wording was rejected because it moved the 'References' heading to the left-column bottom and split the first bibliography entry across the spread.
After: page 10 keeps 'References' at the top of the right column and removes the old target split markers from the first ethics paragraph.
After: Figure 4 remains stable above Ethical Considerations, and page 11 References layout remains readable.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract_word_count=169

verification.command: rg -n "docu-|ment asset|ob-|ject affordances|se-|mantic|general-|ization|The risks are indirect|overstated robust|real-world transfer|material-change|References" tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round37_current/page10.txt tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round37_after/pages10_11.txt paper/venues/acl27/sections/ethical-considerations.tex || true
verification.evidence: Current page 10 text contains the old target split markers; after pages 10-11 text and ethical-considerations.tex contain the final ethics-risk wording, keep References at right-column top, and no longer contain the old target split markers.

workspace_note: The repository had unrelated pre-existing modified paper, docs, evidence, figure, and test files before this round. This evidence record only claims the round37 Ethical Considerations risk-paragraph polish plus the new record/evidence files.
